title: Brazilian Sausage Skewers
description: Grilled sausages with a Brazilian twist, served with a side of tangy salsa.

ingredients.name: Brazilian sausages
ingredients.notes: Look for chorizo or linguiça for authentic flavor

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for 30 minutes before grilling

ingredients.name: red bell pepper
ingredients.notes: Cut into large chunks for kebabs

instructions: Soak skewers in water for at least 30 minutes.
Thread sausages, onion, bell pepper, and zucchini onto skewers.
In a small bowl, mix together lime juice, garlic powder, and a pinch of salt.
Brush the skewers with the lime mixture and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until sausages are cooked through.
Let skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve with a side of tangy salsa.
